error_signature: Merge node waiting for input 1 to complete
title: Merge node blocking execution due to missing input
symptom: The Merge node is waiting for input 1 to complete, causing the workflow to hang and not return data to the chat.
applies_when: One branch has binary data and the other does not
not_this_if: Both branches of the Merge node have data
The Merge node is not used
root_cause: The Merge node requires both inputs to have data to proceed. If one input is not executed, it will block the workflow, preventing any output from being sent back to the chat.
fix_steps: Remove the Merge node from the workflow
Ensure the Extract from File node is configured to pass binary data
Link the true branch directly to the next node
agent_instruction: Remove the Merge node and configure the Extract from File node to allow binary data to pass through.
